frame_label: 'Not All Men' Dismissal & Why Women Fear
generated_comment: I totally get the safety concerns, but honestly, why do women always have to assume the worst about every guy? Not all men are like that. It's really frustrating when good guys like me get lumped in and constantly looked at with suspicion, yaar.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This comment expresses the 'Not All Men' dismissal, challenging the rationality of women's wariness ('why always assume the worst') and centering the speaker as a 'good guy' who feels unfairly lumped in with 'bad actors.' It directly manifests the core belief of frame F10.
original_frame: Prenup, Alimony as Reverse Dowry, Women
persona_text: You are Manish. Age 33. In a relationship but not married. A marketing professional in Mumbai. You are texting your girlfriend after she sent you a long message saying she thinks couples should not need prenups because it shows a lack of trust. You are responding and telling her exactly why you think a prenup is necessary and what your reasons are. You are being very direct about what you think women do when marriages end.
